bio.inLoveWith: passionate about building innovative and efficient solutions.

projects.sectionIntro: A curated set of projects I built, with a focus on product thinking, interface quality, and integration with hardware and automation.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: A modern online store focused on purchase experience, responsive layout, and a foundation ready for future growth.

ecommerceMobile.title: E-commerce Mobile
ecommerceMobile.description: Mobile-first e-commerce version designed for fast navigation, touch-friendly UI, and a direct buying flow.

storeManagement.title: Store Management System
storeManagement.description: A system to support store operations, structured for product management, internal processes, and day-to-day tracking.

bluetoothCar.title: ESP32 Bluetooth Car
bluetoothCar.description: An IoT project to control a robotic car over Bluetooth, combining electronics, connectivity, and motion.

library.title: ESAN Library
library.description: A Python application for organizing and managing a library, focused on clear structure and practical usage.

roboticArm.title: Bluetooth Robotic Arm
roboticArm.description: A Bluetooth-controlled robotic arm system built with a focus on precision, responsiveness, and applied robotics.
